water.name: Carmel River (below Los Padres Dam)
aliases: Carmel River below Los Padres Dam

authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

reaches.name: Tributaries below Los Padres Dam and main stem, Los Padres Dam to Rosie's Bridge
reaches.toDesc: Bridge at Robles Del Rio/Esquiline Roads (Rosie's Bridge)

reaches.name: Main stem below Rosie's Bridge
reaches.fromDesc: Bridge at Robles Del Rio/Esquiline Roads (Rosie's Bridge)

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.40(b)(26) — Carmel River below Los Padres Dam (Monterey Co.)
sources.quotedText: (26) Carmel River below Los Padres Dam. (Monterey Co.). (A) Carmel River tributaries below Los Padres Dam and main stem from Los Padres Dam to the bridge at Robles Del Rio/Esquiline Roads (Rosie's Bridge). Closed to all fishing all year. (B) Carmel River main stem below the bridge at Robles Del Rio/Esquiline Roads (Rosie's Bridge). Also see Section 8.00(c) Low-Flow Restrictions. Dec. 1 through Mar. 7, but only on Sat., Sun., Wed., and opening and closing days. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

sources.title: 2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (CDFW booklet)
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

parameters.note: Applies to Carmel River tributaries below Los Padres Dam, and the main stem from Los Padres Dam downstream to the bridge at Robles Del Rio/Esquiline Roads (Rosie's Bridge).

regulations.humanSummary: Closed to all fishing all year on Carmel River tributaries below Los Padres Dam and the main stem from Los Padres Dam to Rosie's Bridge
regulations.verbatimText: Carmel River tributaries below Los Padres Dam and main stem from Los Padres Dam to the bridge at Robles Del Rio/Esquiline Roads (Rosie's Bridge). Closed to all fishing all year.

parameters.note: Open only on Saturdays, Sundays, Wednesdays, and opening/closing days within the Dec. 1–Mar. 7 season. Also see CCR §8.00(c) Low-Flow Restrictions.

regulations.humanSummary: Open Dec. 1 through Mar. 7, but only Saturdays, Sundays, Wednesdays, and opening/closing days, on the Carmel River main stem below Rosie's Bridge
regulations.verbatimText: Carmel River main stem below the bridge at Robles Del Rio/Esquiline Roads (Rosie's Bridge). Dec. 1 through Mar. 7, but only on Sat., Sun., Wed., and opening and closing days.

parameters.note: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

regulations.humanSummary: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

parameters.counting_rule: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead (adipose-fin-clipped, denoted ** in the regulations) daily bag limit; 4 hatchery trout or hatchery-steelhead in possession.

regulations.humanSummary: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead daily; 4 in possession
regulations.verbatimText: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead **. 4 hatchery trout or hatchery-steelhead ** in possession.

parameters.note: Also subject to CCR §8.00(c) Low-Flow Restrictions, which may close fishing on this reach when streamflow drops below designated thresholds.

regulations.humanSummary: Subject to low-flow closure restrictions under CCR §8.00(c)

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
